2308620.name: RPG Maker MV - Pixel Pack 1 Characters - Faces - Tilesets
2308620.description:
Pixel Pack 1
Characters - Faces - Tilesets

This is a huge collection of unique
characters that will be great for
creating your own unique fantasy world!

Aligned in 48x48px
From ordinary humans to monsters and other creatures like Minotaurs, Swines, Giants, a Hippo and more!

Along with all this comes a complete Tileset to build a whole new game with vibrant colors.
+ Extra usable graphics.

Pack Contents:
Tileset: A1-5,B,C,D
characters: 190 (4dir&1dir+ animated objects)+(1 topdown with weapon)
Enemies Sideview battlers: 19
Faces: 38
Battlebacks1 (floors): 8
Battlebacks2 (walls): 6
Parallaxes: 1
System (Window graphics): 3
System (IconSet): 1 set of 283 icons
Weapons (For Sideview actors): 19
